What even is this

Chaos. But make it
Sri Lankan.

Players put the most outrageous answer cards, imitate famous Sri Lankan figures, act out ridiculous situations, and somehow survive getting judged by the whole set. End of the game, one legend walks away being the loku scene.

🃏

Pissu answers

Play your funniest answer card — or if the judge demands it, write something original on a chooty piece of paper. Either way, the judge picks. Fairness not guaranteed.

🎭

Legendary imitations

Imitate other players, people you all personally know, or shape eke famous people. Gets personal fast.

🎬

Chaotic acting

Get into groups and act out the most ridiculous, outrageous scenes imaginable. No script. No dignity. Just pure chaos.

👀

Pure judgment

The Kudu Kaaraya picks the winner. One round at a time. Abuse your power. Like a proper aunty would.

Follow Us on Instagram

How to play

Simple enough even
after 3 shots.

All you need is 3–8 players, zero shame, and someone who recently ate parippu.

01

Pick the judge

Official method: whoever most recently ate parippu. That person is the Kudu Kaaraya / Kaariya. They run the round. Power goes to their head immediately.

02

Play your cards

Everyone gets 7 answer cards. Throw your funniest one, write something on a chooty piece of paper, do your best imitation, or act out the scene on an Act card. All valid. All dangerous.

03

Win. Repeat.

Judge picks the best. Points are earned. No cash prize. Just loku scene. Rotate the judge and go again until someone loses a friend.

Four cards.
All chaotic.

Three maroon cards run the rounds. One orange card is your weapon. The examples below give you a taste — every deck is full of surprises.

Prompt cards 1 point Example card
"What would Aachchi find disturbing, yet oddly charming? ______"

Aiyo who said THIS?

The judge reads the prompt. Everyone throws in an answer. Judge picks the funniest. They will not be fair about it.

Imitate cards 2 points Example card
"A Sri Lankan influencer all players know — chosen by the Kudu Kaaraya."

Poddak dangerous.

Imitate other players, people you all personally know, or shape eke famous people. Friendships are tested at this exact moment.

Act cards 3 points each Example card
"Scene: You are a tuk tuk driver transporting your sudda passenger(s)."

Shame disappears.

Groups of 2 or 3. Act out ridiculous, outrageous scenes. There is always one psychopath bugger who goes way too far.

Answer cards Your hand Example card
"a romantic night with a Nuwara Eliya pony"

Your only weapon.

Everyone starts with 7. Play your most outrageous one each round. Choose wisely. The judge is always biased.
